hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message // .prompt // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo "$INPUT"); KEYWORDS=$(echo "$PROMPT" | grep -oiE '\b(ulw|ultrawork|ralph|ralplan|autopilot|omc-teams|deepinit|ccg|sciomc|ultraqa)\b' | sort -u | tr '\n' ',' | sed 's/,$//'); echo "[OMC MAGIC KEYWORD] 감지: ${KEYWORDS:-알 수 없음}"; echo '해당 skill을 Skill 도구로 invoke하십시오'

INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.message // .prompt // ""' 2>/dev/null || echo "$INPUT"); DETECTED=$(echo "$PROMPT" | grep -oiE '(구현|implement|작성해|만들어|추가해|수정해|fix|add|create|build|refactor|개발|설계해|생성)' | head -1); HASH=$(pwd | cksum | awk '{print $1}'); MARKER="/tmp/.claude-task-${HASH}.lock"; touch "$MARKER"; echo "[TASK-DETECTED] 감지된 키워드: ${DETECTED:-알 수 없음}"; echo ''; echo '=== 필수 워크플로우 (순서 엄수) ==='; echo ''; echo 'STEP 1. omc-teams 사전조사 (AW-003) — setup.md § 3 지시사항 작성 표준 준수'; echo 'STEP 2. Skill: oh-my-claudecode:ultrawork'; echo 'STEP 3. Skill: oh-my-claudecode:deep-interview'; echo 'STEP 4. Skill: oh-my-claudecode:ralplan'; echo ''; echo "마커: $MARKER (Write/Edit 차단 중)"

hooks.prompt:
You are a task classifier. Analyze the user message and determine if it's requesting implementation work.

Rules:
- TASK: creating files, writing/fixing/modifying code, implementing features, refactoring, building something
- QUERY: asking questions, requesting explanations, status checks, reading/analyzing content

User message: $ARGUMENTS

If this is a TASK, respond with exactly:
[AI-TASK-DETECTED] 프롬프트가 구현 요청으로 AI 분류됨.
STEP 1. omc-teams 사전조사 (AW-003)
STEP 2. Skill: oh-my-claudecode:ultrawork
STEP 3. Skill: oh-my-claudecode:deep-interview
STEP 4. Skill: oh-my-claudecode:ralplan

If this is a QUERY, respond with exactly: [QUERY] 조회 요청으로 분류됨. 워크플로우 불필요.

hooks.command: HASH=$(pwd | cksum | awk '{print $1}'); MARKER="/tmp/.claude-task-${HASH}.lock"; if [ -f "$MARKER" ]; then echo '[BLOCKED: DEEP-INTERVIEW REQUIRED] Write/Edit 차단됨. 해제: /oh-my-claudecode:deep-interview 완료 또는 rm /tmp/.claude-task-*.lock'; exit 1; fi

HASH=$(pwd | cksum | awk '{print $1}'); MARKER="/tmp/.claude-task-${HASH}.lock"; [ -f "$MARKER" ] || exit 0; DI_FILE=$(ls .omc/state/sessions/*/deep-interview-state.json 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -z "$DI_FILE" ] && exit 0; ACTIVE=$(jq -r '.active' "$DI_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 'true'); [ "$ACTIVE" = 'false' ] && rm -f "$MARKER" && echo '[DEEP-INTERVIEW COMPLETE] Write/Edit 차단 해제'

SCRIPT=".claude/check-criteria.sh"; if [ -f "" ]; then bash "" --score 2>/dev/null; SCORE=; if [ -n "" ] && [ "" -lt 90 ]; then echo "[QUALITY GATE FAILED] % < 90% — 작업 계속 필요"; echo "bash .claude/check-criteria.sh 로 미달 항목 확인"; exit 2; else echo "[Stop Hook] 품질 기준 달성 (?%). 구현 필수 스킬: /convention-python /check-anti-patterns /adversarial-review"; fi; else echo "[Stop Hook] 응답 완료. 코드 변경 시 /check-python-style 실행 권장"; fi
